tools.name: get_odds
tools.description: Get sports odds (moneyline/spreads/totals) grouped by book. Metered by market; the exact cost is returned in the X-Credits-Cost header.

tools.name: get_props
tools.description: Get player props for upcoming games (the premium market). Cost returned in the X-Credits-Cost header.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Get fixtures and live scores. Cost returned in the X-Credits-Cost header.

tools.name: get_books
tools.description: List the sportsbooks currently covered. Cost returned in the X-Credits-Cost header.
